text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
There are some really great runners taking part in
this race. They don't call it the Mile
Championship for nothing.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But it doesn't matter—I won't lose. As long as I
give it all I've got, surely I'll win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm confident that Oguri Cap will be able to pull
this off. Winning this race will solidify both her
skills and her popularity.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna be the mile race champion—just you
wait and see!
